1:
You indicate your readiness to brave the gauntlet of bellicose beaks, and Nonotta sends you over to Pawlin and the Dreamer's Run.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

You indicate your readiness to brave the gauntlet of bellicose beaks, and Nonotta sends you over to Pawlin and the Dreamer's Run.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

2:
You speak with Pawlin, who unlocks the door to his little darlings' temporary home. Enter the Dreamer's Run, and do your part to save Hatching–tide by collecting eggs in the FATE “An Eggsistential Threat.”

※The FATE “An Eggsistential Threat” can only be completed as a Disciple of War or Magic.
